mathematical_rationale: Given a finite configuration space, the entropy (in bits) of a uniform distribution over configurations is log₂|C|. After one deterministic step f : C → C, the distribution collapses onto the image f(C), with entropy at most log₂|f(C)|. If f is non-injective, |f(C)| < |C|, so the entropy loss Δ = log₂|C| - log₂|f(C)| is strictly positive. This quantifies the irreversible information loss per step, bridging continuous FRSB constraints with discrete hardware irreversibility.
lean_4_code_delta:
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Card
import Mathlib.Data.Fintype.Basic
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Log.Base

open Classical

variable (S : ℕ) (Γ : Type) [Fintype Γ] (Q : Type) [Fintype Q]

structure Config where
  tape : TMTapeConfig S Γ
  state : Q
  head : Fin S

def TM_Path : Type := Stream' (Config S Γ Q)

variable {S Γ Q}

instance : Fintype (Config S Γ Q) :=
  Fintype.ofEquiv (TMTapeConfig S Γ × Q × Fin S) <|
    { toFun := fun ⟨t, q, h⟩ => ⟨t, q, h⟩,
      invFun := fun ⟨t, q, h⟩ => (t, q, h),
      left_inv := by rintro ⟨_, _, _⟩; rfl,
      right_inv := by rintro ⟨_, _, _⟩; rfl }

def step_non_injective (f : Config S Γ Q → Config S Γ Q) : Prop :=
  ¬ Function.Injective f

def path_entropy_delta (f : Config S Γ Q → Config S Γ Q) : ℝ :=
  Real.logb 2 (Fintype.card (Config S Γ Q)) -
  Real.logb 2 (Nat.card (Set.range f))

lemma Nat.card_range_finite (f : Config S Γ Q → Config S Γ Q) :
    Nat.card (Set.range f) = Fintype.card (Set.range f) := by
  have : Finite (Config S Γ Q) := inferInstance
  have : Finite (Set.range f) := Set.finite_range f
  rw [Nat.card_eq_fintype_card]

noncomputable instance fintype_range (f : Config S Γ Q → Config S Γ Q) :
    Fintype (Set.range f) := Set.fintypeRange f

theorem non_reversible_step_loss_pos (f : Config S Γ Q → Config S Γ Q)
    (h_non_inj : step_non_injective f) :
    path_entropy_delta f > 0 := by
  unfold path_entropy_delta
  have h_card_pos : 0 < Fintype.card (Config S Γ Q) := Fintype.card_pos
  have h_fin : Finite (Config S Γ Q) := inferInstance
  have h_range_card_le : Nat.card (Set.range f) ≤ Fintype.card (Config S Γ Q) := by
    rw [Nat.card_range_finite f]
    exact Fintype.card_le_of_injective (Set.range f).subtype Subtype.val_injective
  have h_range_card_lt : Nat.card (Set.range f) < Fintype.card (Config S Γ Q) := by
    rw [Nat.card_range_finite f]
    apply Fintype.card_lt_of_not_surjective
    rw [Set.range_iff_surjective]
    intro h_surj
    have h_inj : Function.Injective f := by
      apply Finite.injective_iff_surjective.mp
      · exact h_surj
    exact h_non_inj h_inj
  rw [Nat.card_range_finite f] at h_range_card_lt
  have h_range_card_pos : 0 < Fintype.card (Set.range f) := by
    apply Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr
    use f (Classical.arbitrary _)
    simp
  have : Real.logb 2 (Fintype.card (Config S Γ Q)) >
         Real.logb 2 (Fintype.card (Set.range f)) :=
    Real.logb_lt_logb_of_lt h_card_pos (by positivity) (by exact_mod_cast h_range_card_lt)
  linarith
expected_verifier_state: Definitions `Config`, `TM_Path`, `step_non_injective`, `path_entropy_delta` added; theorem `non_reversible_step_loss_pos` proven, establishing that any non-injective TM step incurs strictly positive entropy loss.
